title: malaxis major
intro: Malaxis major, also known as the greater purple fringed orchid, is a perennial orchid species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against various health issues. The health benefits of Malaxis major include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and preventing infections. The herbal preparations of Malaxis major typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
